subject: Re: Bell 407 LSJ
body:
yes


----- Original Message ----
From: "LVJET@aol.com" <LVJET@aol.com>
To: JEEPROJECT@YAHOO.COM
Sent: Friday, April 20, 2007 6:04:21 AM
Subject: Bell 407 LSJ


Jeffrey,
Is it ok to take take Bell 407 to Puerto Rico to have carpet installed?
I will make sure it is completed by Wed night.
 
G2: APU is repaired, Meridian at TEB re shimmed the Thermostat harness on APU which governors the 
amount of air that Load control valve exhausts. 
Eric Roth is working seat cushion bottoms at his shop, he completed the gluing process of foam to leather for seat backs yesterday in Teterboro.
 






See what's free at AOL.com.
body_html:
yes
